fact_nuggets.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.2 Generation IX 1.3 Other effects Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Barb Barrage deals damage and has a 30% chance to poison the target. Its power is doubled if the target is affected by a non-volatile status condition . Pokemon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 15 Agile Strong Power 60 45 75 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? May inflict the target with poison Power is doubled if the target has a status condition Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Barb Barrage's PP was decreased to 10. It has a 50% chance of poisoning the target, and its power is doubled if the target is already poisoned. Other effects [ edit | edit source ] In Pokemon Legends: Arceus , a Hisuian Qwilfish that has used Barb Barrage in the strong style at least 20 times can evolve into Overqwil . In Pokemon Scarlet and Violet , a Hisuian Qwilfish will evolve into Overqwil simply by leveling up while knowing this move. In Pokemon Legends: Z-A , a Hisuan Qwilfish will evolve into Overqwil by having Barb Barrage hit 20 targets.
